<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Hyper file name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the hyper file that contains the inserted data.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>SQL query</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>SQL command used to insert the data into the table from the hyper file.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Number</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Hyper configuration](#TableauHyperConfig)

### Throws

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONNECTIVITY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FILE_DOESNT_EXIST
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FILE_IS_NOT_DIRECTORY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:HYPER_EXCEPTION
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:ILLEGAL_PATH
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNKNOWN

## Query Data From Hyper File

`<tableau-specialist:query-data-from-hyper-file>`

Queries data from tables belonging to a hyper file.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Hyper file name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the hyper file that contains the queried data.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>SQL query</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>SQL query that selects data from the hyper file.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Object</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Hyper configuration](#TableauHyperConfig)

### Throws

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONNECTIVITY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FILE_DOESNT_EXIST
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FILE_IS_NOT_DIRECTORY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:HYPER_EXCEPTION
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:ILLEGAL_PATH
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNKNOWN

## Update data from hyper file

`<tableau-specialist:update-data-from-hyper-file>`

Updates data from tables into a .hyper file by sending SQL queries.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Hyper file path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the hyper file that is updated.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>SQL query</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>SQL command used to update the data in the table from the hyper file.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Number</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Hyper configuration](#TableauHyperConfig)

### Throws

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONNECTIVITY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FILE_DOESNT_EXIST
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FILE_IS_NOT_DIRECTORY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:HYPER_EXCEPTION
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:ILLEGAL_PATH
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNKNOWN

## Append to file upload

`<tableau-specialist:append-to-file-upload>`

Uploads a block of data and appends it to the data that is already uploaded.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>File Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content of the file to upload is included in a MIME multipart message.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Upload Session Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the upload session. You get this value when you start an upload session using the <strong>Initiate file upload</strong> operation.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Online Rest Configuration](#TableauSpecialistConfig)

### Throws

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONNECTIVITY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FILE_SIZE_TOO_LARGE
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FILE_UPLOAD_NOT_FOUND
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FORBIDDEN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INSUFFICIENT_SITE_STORAGE_REMAINING
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:MALFORMED_REQUEST_BODY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:MISSING_FILE_DATA
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:NOT_A_PUBLISHER
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:TIMEOUT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNKNOWN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UPLOAD_FAILURE

## Create project

`<tableau-specialist:create-project>`

Creates a project on the site. You can also create project hierarchies by creating a project under
the specified parent project on the site.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Publish value</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies whether to publish the sample workbooks provided by Tableau to the project.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>InputStream containing specific attributes for this operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Online Rest Configuration](#TableauSpecialistConfig)

### Throws

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:BAD_REQUEST
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:BAD_REQUEST_PERMISSION
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONNECTIVITY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FORBIDDEN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INSUFFICIENT_SITE_STORAGE_REMAINING
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INVALID_REQUEST_METHOD
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:PROJECT_NAME_CONFLICT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:SITE_NOT_FOUND
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:TIMEOUT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNKNOWN

## Create site

`<tableau-specialist:create-site>`

Creates a site on a Tableau server.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>InputStream containing specific attributes for this operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Server Rest Configuration](#TableauServerSpecialistConfig)

### Throws

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:BAD_REQUEST
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONNECTIVITY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CREATE_SITE_INVALID_ADMINISTRATOR_MODE
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FORBIDDEN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INVALID_REQUEST_METHOD
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:SITE_NAME_CONFLICT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:SITE_URL_CONFLICT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:TIMEOUT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNKNOWN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:USER_QUOTA_OR_ADMIN_MODE_CONFLICT

## Delete project

`<tableau-specialist:delete-project>`

Deletes the specified project from the site. When a project is deleted, all of its assets are also
deleted, such as its associated workbooks, data sources, project view options, and rights. Use this
operation with caution.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Project ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the project to delete.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Online Rest Configuration](#TableauSpecialistConfig)

### Throws

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONNECTIVITY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:DELETION_FORBIDDEN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FORBIDDEN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INSUFFICIENT_SITE_STORAGE_REMAINING
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:PROJECT_NOT_FOUND
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:TIMEOUT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNKNOWN

## Delete site

`<tableau-specialist:delete-site>`

Deletes the site the user is logged into.

### Parameters

The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FORBIDDEN

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:TIMEOUT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNKNOWN

## Publish datasource

`<tableau-specialist:publish-datasource>`

Publishes a data source to the site, or appends data to an existing data source. To make other
changes to a published data source, call **Update Data Source** or **Update Data Source
Connection**.

Use this operation in the following ways:

- Publish a data source in a single request. You must include the content of the data source file in
  the body of the request. The maximum size of a file that can be published in a single request is
  64 MB. To avoid timing out the publishing process, use the **asJob** parameter to make data source
  publication asynchronous.
- Publish a data source in multiple requests. You must initiate a file upload by calling **Initiate
  File Upload**, sending portions of the file to the server using **Append to File Upload**, and
  then committing the upload by calling **Publish Data Source**. In this case, **Publish Data
  Source** does not contain the file to publish.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Overwrite flag</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Set to <code>true</code> to overwrite a data source that has the same name. Set to <code>false</code> to ensure failure if the specified data source already exists.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>As job value</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies whether to publish data sources asynchronously.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Append flag</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Set to <code>true</code> to append the data that is published to an existing data source with the same name. If set to <code>true</code> but the data source doesnât already exist, the operation will fail.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Datasource Request Options</p></td><td><div><div><p>One of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#PublishDatasourceRequestBody">Publish Datasource Request Body</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#PublishDatasourceRequestSessionId">Publish Datasource Request Session Id</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Datasource object.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Online Rest Configuration](#TableauSpecialistConfig)

### Throws

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONNECTIVITY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:DATA_SOURCE_NOT_FOUND
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FORBIDDEN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INCOMPATIBLE_OVERWRITE_AND_APPEND_VALUES
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INSUFFICIENT_PRIVILEGES
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INSUFFICIENT_SITE_STORAGE_REMAINING
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INVALID_ASK_DATA_ENABLEMENT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INVALID_FILE_NAME_FILE_TYPE
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:PUBLISHING_ERROR
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:TIMEOUT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNKNOWN

## Publish workbook

`<tableau-specialist:publish-workbook>`

Publishes a workbook onto the site. To make changes to a published workbook, call **Update
Workbook** or **Update Workbook Connection**.

Use this operation in the following ways:

- Publish a workbook in a single request. You must include the content of the workbook file in the
  body of the request. The maximum size of a file that can be published in a single request is 64
  MB. To avoid timing out the publishing process, use the **asJob** parameter to make workbook
  publication asynchronous.
- Publish a workbook in multiple requests. You must initiate a file upload by calling **Initiate
  File Upload**, sending portions of the file to the server using **Append to File Upload**, and
  then committing the upload by calling **Publish Workbook**. In this case, **Publish Workbook**
  does not contain the file to publish.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Overwrite flag</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Set to <code>true</code> to overwrite a data source that has the same name. Set to <code>false</code> to ensure failure if the specified data source already exists.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>As job value</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies whether to publish data sources asynchronously.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Skip connection</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>If set to <code>true</code>, the Tableau server does not check if a non-published connection of a workbook is reachable. Publishing will succeed but unchecked connection issues may result in a non-functioning workbook.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Request Options</p></td><td><div><div><p>One of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#PublishWorkbookRequestBody">Publish Workbook Request Body</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#PublishWorkbookRequestSessionId">Publish Workbook Request Session Id</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Workbook object.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Online Rest Configuration](#TableauSpecialistConfig)

### Throws

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONCURRENT_UPDATE
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONNECTIVITY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FAILED_CONNECTION_CHECK
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FORBIDDEN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INSUFFICIENT_SITE_STORAGE_REMAINING
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:MISSING_OR_INVALID_FILE_TYPE
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:PUBLISHING_OVERWRITE
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:TIMEOUT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNKNOWN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:WORKBOOK_NOT_FOUND

## Query projects

`<tableau-specialist:query-projects>`

Returns a list of projects on the specified site, with optional parameters for specifying the paging
of large results.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Number of items to return in one response. The minimum is 1 and the maximum is 1000.</p></td><td><p>100</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter Expression</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#FilterExpression">Filter Expression</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that specifies a subset of data sources to return.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Sort Expression</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#SortExpression">Sort Expression</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that specifies the order in which to return user information.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryIterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreIterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Object</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Online Rest Configuration](#TableauSpecialistConfig)

### Throws

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONNECTIVITY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:FORBIDDEN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INSUFFICIENT_SITE_STORAGE_REMAINING
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INVALID_PAGE_NUMBER
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INVALID_PAGE_SIZE
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:PAGE_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:TIMEOUT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNKNOWN

## Query site

`<tableau-specialist:query-site>`

Returns information about the site the user is logged into.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Include Usage</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates whether to include usage in the response.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Server Rest Configuration](#TableauServerSpecialistConfig)

### Throws

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:BAD_REQUEST
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:BAD_REQUEST_PERMISSION
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONNECTIVITY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INVALID_ADMINISTRATOR_MODE
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INVALID_REQUEST_METHOD
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:SITE_NAME_CONFLICT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:SITE_NOT_FOUND
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:SITE_OPERATIONS_FORBIDDEN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:SITE_URL_CONFLICT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:TIMEOUT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNAUTHORIZED_ACCESS
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:UNKNOWN
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:USER_QUOTA_OR_ADMIN_MODE_CONFLICT

## Query sites

`<tableau-specialist:query-sites>`

Returns a list of the sites on the server that the caller of this method has access to.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Number of items to return in one response. The minimum is 1 and the maximum is 1000.</p></td><td><p>100</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Object</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:CONNECTIVITY
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INVALID_PAGE_NUMBER

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:PAGE_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED

## Update project

`<tableau-specialist:update-project>`

Updates a project on the specified site.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Project ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the project to update.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Publish value</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies whether to publish the sample workbooks provided by Tableau to the project.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>InputStream containing specific attributes for this operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Online Rest Configuration](#TableauSpecialistConfig)

## Update site

`<tableau-specialist:update-site>`

Modifies settings for the site the user is logged into.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>InputStream containing specific attributes for this operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration used to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Server Rest Configuration](#TableauServerSpecialistConfig)

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:BAD_REQUEST
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:BAD_REQUEST_PERMISSION

- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INVALID_ADMINISTRATOR_MODE
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:INVALID_REQUEST_METHOD
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:SITE_NAME_CONFLICT
- TABLEAU-SPECIALIST:SITE_NOT_FOUND
